\tzpentry{ID3424}{Acoustic Topological Field Dynamics Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3424 introduces Acoustic Topological Field Dynamics Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} g = \frac{2 - \chi}{2}, \quad \chi = V - E + F \text{ (Euler characteristic)} \end{equation}
